overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the caped character walking through a foggy, neon-lit urban street at night toward a towering modern skyscraper. The atmosphere is dark and moody with heavy atmospheric haze and artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy downtown street with elevated highway overpass

agents.ego_description: Batman character walking steadily down the foggy street with cape flowing, heading toward the illuminated skyscraper

entered.detail: Tall modern glass and steel skyscraper dominating the skyline with illuminated windows
Concrete elevated highway structure with metal railings running parallel to the street
Tall street lamp casting warm yellow light through the fog
Dark brick commercial building facade with fire escapes and illuminated windows
Lit storefront awning with signage visible beneath the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following Batman walking down a foggy urban street at night. A massive glass skyscraper looms ahead in the distance while an elevated highway overpass runs along the left side. Street lamps cast dramatic beams through the haze, and the environment is devoid of pedestrians or traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching skyscraper base with street-level storefronts

events.description: distant human figure appears standing on the sidewalk ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk toward the skyscraper base while the camera angle shifts slightly to the right

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing stationary on the sidewalk near the building entrance

entered.detail: Curved street lamp post with bright light emerging from the fog on the right side
Covered entrance area at the base of the skyscraper with illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: As Batman approaches the base of the skyscraper, the street narrows and the camera shifts slightly right. The elevated highway disappears behind as street lamps on the right side become prominent. A distant figure becomes visible standing near the building entrance ahead, and the skyscraper facade fills more of the frame with its architectural details becoming clearer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, neon-lit urban street that gradually closes in on the imposing base of a modern skyscraper. It begins with a third-person view of Batman walking through dense fog, with an elevated highway overpass lining the left side and street lamps casting dramatic beams through the haze. As he advances toward the looming glass tower, the street narrows and the camera shifts slightly right, causing the highway to disappear from view. The scene then focuses on the right side of the road where street lamps become more prominent, while the skyscraper's architectural details fill the frame. Finally, the camera closes the distance to the building entrance, revealing a solitary figure standing in the distance.
